title: THREE RIVERS HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: THREE RIVERS HEALTH CENTER THREE RIVERS HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services including a nurse advice line. Also has a pharmacy. 150 S Wall Street Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Tribal members of the Confederated Tribes of the Coos, Lower Umpqua and Siuslaw Indians and their widows/widowers Hours: Health Care Center Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Pharmacy: Monday-Friday 8am-1pm and 2pm-6pm, Saturday 8am-2pm Advice Nurse Line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 435-7200 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 435-7200 Other (541) 435-7234 Pharmacy Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, Lane, and Lincoln Counties Services: Indian Health Service Clinics Pharmacies If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THREE RIVERS HEALTH CENTER
